title: Bitcoin Miner CleanSpark Tops Quarterly Estimates in Q2 2022
text: CleanSpark reported fiscal second-quarter results for 2022, demonstrating strong operational performance. The company reported quarterly revenue of $41.6 million and adjusted earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation (EBITDA) of $22.5 million. Both results beat analysts' average estimates, and quarterly revenue was up fivefold from the year-ago level. The company achieved record operational efficiency and demonstrated operational scale during a period of overall bitcoin mining sector challenges. The strong results positioned CleanSpark as an emerging leader in the bitcoin mining sector.
